name: Neodecortech S.p.A.
summary: Neodecortech S.p.A. produces and markets decorative papers for industrial sectors in Italy, Europe, Asia, the United States, and internationally. The company offers printed decorative papers, printed and melamine-impregnated papers, and finish-foils primarily for the furniture, laminate flooring, and camper/caravan segments under the Confalonieri brand; and paper-based laminates for covering, door, and surface segments under the Texte brand. It also provides plastic printed films and plastic printed laminated films for LVT flooring under the Plana. The company was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Filago, Italy.
